a.xlink:title: Exception when an argument is invalid.
Exception when an arithmetic error occurs.
Exception when an address is not correctly aligned.
Exception when a conversion from one type to another is invalid.
Exception when a fatal error has occurred.
Exception when an input/output error is detected.
Exception when a value is not within a given range.
Exception when a fatal error has occurred.
Exception when a 'parallel' fatal error is generated.
